text:
The typical mistake is assuming that the ropes burn at a consistent rate, when in fact they burn unevenly, which can be leveraged to measure the desired time.
To measure exactly 45 min, you can use 3 ropes: light one rope at both ends and one rope at one end simultaneously, and when the first rope burns out (30 min), light the third rope at one end, achieving a total of 45 min when the third rope burns out, thus the minimum count is 3.
